clusters.justification: This domain encompasses the broad processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and general mood states, subserved by macroscopic limbic and autonomic regulatory systems.
This domain captures the computation of subjective utility, reward anticipation, and reinforcement-based decision-making, which are primarily mediated by frontostriatal and dopaminergic circuitry.

This domain encompasses internally directed, self-generated representations regarding the self, others, and interpersonal narratives, aligning tightly with the functional axis of the default mode system.
